statement: In every magma, Equation 2604 (`x = (y * ((z * z) * x)) * w`) implies Equation 2863 (`x = ((x * (y * x)) * x) * y`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0861
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op y (op (op z z) x)) w)) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op (op x (op y x)) x) y)
